{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = arena (The Last Horizon)
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The Arena is the location where the fights take place.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c30">''The Knight'', chapter 30</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
